steps.name: Metric category types and configuration
steps.description: Define MetricCategoryId, MetricCategory, CategorySample, HoverState, ChartMode types. Create categoryConfig with const array of 4 categories including formatting, colors, aggregate applicability, stats config, and session table columns.
criteria: 4 metric categories defined with distinct colors and Y-axis config
Context category marked as aggregate-not-applicable
Each category has value formatter producing display strings
Stats config and session column definitions present per category

steps.name: Chart renderer pure functions
steps.description: Filled-area line chart renderer composing with oscilloscope functions. Adds gradient fill, horizontal grid lines, Y-axis labels, current value overlay, crosshair, hit-test, and sparkline rendering.
criteria: Filled-area chart renders line with gradient fill beneath
Horizontal grid lines drawn at Y-axis intervals
Hit-test maps mouseX to nearest sample index and value
Sparkline renders line-only (no fill, no grid, no labels)
Crosshair renders vertical line + dot at specified index

steps.name: Extend MultiSessionStore with per-category buffers
steps.description: Add per-session per-category TimeSeriesBuffers and aggregate category buffers to MultiSessionStore. Add subscribe/notify, appendSessionSample, getSessionBuffer, getAggregateBuffer methods.
criteria: Per-session samples appendable for each of 4 categories
Aggregate buffers auto-recomputed on sample append (sum for tokens/cost/agents)
Context aggregate buffer not populated (non-applicable)
Subscribers notified on state change
Existing addSession/removeSession/updateSession/getSessions unchanged

steps.name: Extend hookProcessor to feed category samples
steps.description: After metrics update, compute per-category sample values and call appendSessionSample on the extended MultiSessionStore.
criteria: Token rate and cost rate samples derived from instantaneous rate computation
Agent count and context percentage samples derived from updated SessionMetrics
Samples appended to MultiSessionStore per session per category on each event
Existing broadcast-session pipeline unchanged

tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/per-session-category-buffers.test.ts#Agent count sample derived from session metrics
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/per-session-category-buffers.test.ts#Existing single-session pipeline unchanged after extension

steps.name: PMContainerView with sidebar+detail layout
steps.description: Replace PerformanceMonitorView with master-detail layout shell managing selectedCategory, selectedWindow, and hoverState. Subscribes to MultiSessionStore. Renders PMSidebar (left) and PMDetailPane (right).
criteria: Sidebar+detail dual-pane layout renders with correct proportions
Category selection updates detail pane content
Time window selection persists across category switches
View subscribes to MultiSessionStore and re-renders on data updates
sec-hdr title area showing 'Performance Monitor'

tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/sidebar-and-detail-layout.test.ts#Time window selection persists when switching categories

steps.name: PMSidebar with sparklines
steps.description: Category list where each row shows label, current value, and sparkline canvas. Selected category has accent-colored left border.
criteria: 4 category rows rendered with correct labels and colors
Current value updates from aggregate buffer latest sample
Sparkline canvas renders last 60s line using chartRenderer
Selected category highlighted with left border in category color
Clicking a row emits category selection

tests: tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/sidebar-and-detail-layout.test.ts#Sidebar shows current value for each category from latest sample
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/sidebar-and-detail-layout.test.ts#@property: every category has all required sidebar display fields

steps.name: PMChart with filled-area rendering and hover
steps.description: Replace PMChart with filled-area canvas chart supporting aggregate and mini modes. Emits hover coordinates for tooltip. Renders crosshair when hovered.
criteria: Aggregate mode: Y-axis labels, horizontal grid lines, current value overlay, gradient fill
Mini mode: no grid lines, session label + value overlay, gradient fill
Hover emits sample index, value, and time offset to container
Crosshair renders at hovered position (vertical line + dot)
Canvas sizes responsively via ResizeObserver

tests: tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/hover-tooltip.test.ts#User hovers over token chart and sees rate with time offset
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/hover-tooltip.test.ts#Hit-test maps hover position to correct sample for tooltip
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/hover-tooltip.test.ts#Tooltip handles edge of chart area gracefully
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/hover-tooltip.test.ts#Tooltip disappears when cursor leaves canvas area
tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/hover-tooltip.test.ts#@property: same mouseX always produces same sampleIndex

steps.name: PMDetailPane with aggregate graph, per-session grid, stats, table
steps.description: Detail pane rendering all category-scoped sections. Aggregate graph omitted when category is non-aggregatable. Per-session grid auto-arranges. Hidden when single session active.
criteria: Aggregate graph visible for tokens/cost/agents categories
Aggregate graph omitted for context; per-session graphs render larger
Per-session grid shows one mini-graph per active session with shared Y-axis scale
Per-session grid hidden when only 1 session active
Stats grid and session table render below graphs

tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/sidebar-and-detail-layout.test.ts#Per-session grid shown when two or more sessions are active

steps.name: PMTooltip, PMStatsGrid, PMSessionTable
steps.description: Floating tooltip, 2-column stats grid, and per-session breakdown table -- all driven by category configuration.
criteria: Tooltip shows formatted value + time offset, positioned near cursor
Tooltip border color matches category line color
Stats grid shows 6 cells (2x3) with category-specific labels and values
Session table columns change per selected category
Session rows sorted by primary metric descending

steps.name: Wire PMContainerView into plugin registration and App.tsx
steps.description: Update index.ts to wire extended MultiSessionStore. Ensure PMContainerView renders in performance-monitor view slot. Remove v1 view files and unused v1 types.
criteria: Performance Monitor v2 renders in the performance-monitor view slot
Extended MultiSessionStore wired with per-category buffer initialization
v1 view files (PMAggregateGrid, PMSessionDetail) removed
Existing views (Oscilloscope, Gauge Cluster, Dashboard) unchanged
PMViewMode, AgentMetrics, SessionDetailData types removed from types.ts

tests: tests/acceptance/norbert-performance-monitor-v2/sidebar-and-detail-layout.test.ts#Performance Monitor v2 renders in the performance-monitor view slot

validation.revision_notes: F1: added tests for 02-02 hookProcessor. F2: added wiring test for 05-01. F3: US-PM-003 drill-down deferred to future iteration (v2 focuses on sidebar+category layout). F4: added time window persistence test to 03-01.
